description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) tasked with fixing a critical log archiving script (`log_archiver`) located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/log_archiver`. Address a data loss incident by ensuring source files in `archiver/core.py` are only deleted after successful archive creation. Update the file discovery regex in `archiver/core.py` to support ISO-8601 date formats (e.g., `app.log.2023-10-25`). Implement the `check_disk_space` function in `archiver/validators.py` to prevent execution if free space is less than 110% of the source size. All 15 tests in the `tests/` directory must pass.
